title: phyllostegia lydgatei
intro: Phyllostegia lydgatei, also known as Lydgate's phyllostegia or Ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii, characterized by its fragrant yellow flowers and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Phyllostegia lydgatei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Phyllostegia lydgatei is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and has also been used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and injuries.
